---
title: "Data Clean"
author: "Chandler Grote"
date: "2024-11-10"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(broom)
library(GGally)
library(tidyr)
library(zoo)
library(ggimage)
library(gt)
library(tidymodels) 
library(kknn)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggh4x)
```

## Loading a week of traking data, very large file
```{r}
track_week_1 <- read.csv("data/tracking_week_1.csv")

track_1_pre_snap <- track_week_1 %>% filter(frameType == "BEFORE_SNAP", !is.na(event))

unique(track_1_pre_snap$event)
```
